meta.target: the Launch button for Ubuntu 24.04 LTS Noble Numbat
meta.goal: spin up an Ubuntu 24.04 virtual machine now trying to click on: the Launch button for Ubuntu 24.04 LTS Noble Numbat

description: The screen shows a UI element labeled 'Noble Numbat' with a 'Launch' button and a gear icon. The goal is to click the 'Launch' button to spin up an Ubuntu 24.04 virtual machine.

controls.label: Launch
controls.reason: The 'Launch' button is the primary control for initiating the virtual machine spin-up process and is clearly labeled. The center of the button is the most appropriate click target.
